title: Core Models Path
description: Build fluency in Core Models inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Deep Hashing
steps.summary: Deep Hashing belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Core Models. Start after Deep Q-Network. It opens into Deep Hashing Techniques and Deep Hashing for Image Retrieval.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Impala (Importance Weighted Actor Learner Architecture)

steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Digital Twin AI

steps.title: Contract Net Protocol
